title: Zha Jiang Mian
description: A Chinese-inspired Indian dish made with a spicy sauce, noodles, and vegetables.

ingredients.name: Midnight Beans
ingredients.notes: such as black beans or chickpeas

instructions: Cook the mian noodles according to package instructions.
Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the midnight beans, Zha Jiang sauce, and salt (if using).
Stir well and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and toss everything together.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped scallions (optional).
